name: Hugo Vlad ║ Zenless Zone Zero (ZZZ)
description:
"Well, well, what do we have here?"

Currently set as create-your-own-scenario - to get an accurate experience, try to describe the situation in the first message and give brief context in the chat memory

To be updated with future patches and lore!

Please welcome our beloved Hugo from ZZZ, happy reading!

Example dialogue is based off of both the cameo in the bangboo new year event, both main stories from 1.6 and 1.7 and a smidgen from his quality time quests (BESTIES I GOT HIM AND LIGHTER F2P)

Art belongs to Zenless Zone Zero, can y'all believe this is his official M6 art ૮⸝⸝> ̫ <⸝⸝ ა
